title: Moar Discs
description: Adds multiple fan-made music discs into Minecraft, hopefully.
body:
This mod adds some fan-made music discs to Minecraft.

**All Discs:**

-Alive - T_en_M

-Brute - T_en_M

-Cascade - T_en_M

-Comet - T_en_M

-Forest - T_en_M

-Gilded - T_en_M

-Glide - T_en_M

-Guardian - T_en_M

-Husk - T_en_M

-Lightning - T_en_M

-Luminous - T_en_M

-Northern Lights - T_en_M

-Ochre - T_en_M

-Overtune - T_en_M

-Pumpkin - T_en_M

-Raiders - T_en_M

-Shrieker - T_en_M

-Shulker - T_en_M

-Sleigh - T_en_M

-Snowstorm - T_en_M

-Soulless - T_en_M

-Storm - T_en_M

-Stride - T_en_M

-The Ender Dragon - T_en_M

-The Wither - T_en_M

-Tundra - T_en_M

-Underscore - T_en_M

-Warden Run - T_en_M



**Credits:**

T_en_M - Music Artist - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvWIT0wqW-VZOcJcsO8ZIBw/channels

T_en_M's Discord - https://discord.gg/9yWxs2aGUT

**Original Mod:** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tenms-discs
